input_sources: FAO Global Ecological Zones 2010 — data/external/gez/gez_2010_wgs84.shp (FAO catalog 2fb209d0-fd34-4e5e-a3d8-a13c241eb61b, gez2010.zip)
notes: Site->GEZ spatial join: sf_use_s2(FALSE), st_within primary, st_nearest_feature fallback for 3 site(s): AR-TF1, CA-RBM, CN-SnB. gez_method column flags join method per site.
